highlights.description: Operation scaffolding from schema Query/Mutation types

added.description: `scaffold` command to generate stub operations from schema types
Support --type, --depth, --include, --exclude flags for scaffold filtering
scaffold package with Generator for operation generation
`validate` command to check operations against schema
Support --strict mode and --json output for validation
`diff` command to compare local schema to remote endpoint
Detect added/removed types and fields with breaking change identification
Support --breaking-only and --json output for diff
`watch` command for auto-regeneration on file changes
Debounced file watching with fsnotify

changed.description: `generate` command now uses genqlient as embedded library instead of exec
genqlient CLI no longer required to be installed separately

highlights.description: GraphQL client SDK generator for Go using genqlient
Schema introspection with SDL and JSON output

added.description: GraphQL introspection package with SDL conversion
Introspection client supporting bearer tokens and goauth credentials
ToSDL() method for converting introspection result to Schema Definition Language
ToJSON() method for raw introspection result export
CLI root command with global flags: --creds, --account, --output, --verbose
`introspect` command to fetch GraphQL schema from endpoints
Authentication via goauth credentials file or bearer token
Output formats: SDL (.graphql) and JSON (.json)
`init` command to scaffold genqlient project structure
Project scaffolding creates genqlient.yaml, schema.graphql, operations/, generated/
`generate` command wrapping genqlient for code generation
`version` command for displaying version information

documentation.description: README with workflow documentation: introspect → define operations → generate
Usage examples for all CLI commands
